message:
refactor(raptorq): add safety docs to AVX2 delegation and fix Gaussian elimination tests

Improve unsafe code clarity in GF256 AVX2 kernels and fix test coverage
gaps in linear algebra.

GF256 changes:
- Wrap unsafe calls to AVX2 implementation tables in explicit unsafe
  blocks with SAFETY comments documenting that both callers are
  AVX2-only via target_feature attribute propagation
- Ensures unsafe delegation is auditable and clippy-compliant

Linalg test fixes:
- Expand eliminate_row tests from 2x1 to 2x2 matrix dimensions to
  catch column-elimination bugs that were invisible with single-column
- Test rows now include leading non-pivot coefficients (0xAA, 0xCC)
- Assertions verify full row elimination, not just the pivot column
- Prevents regression if implementation accidentally zeros pivot column
  without preserving non-pivot structure

Tests fixed:
- eliminate_row_pivot_only_with_rhs_nonone_updates_rhs_only()
- eliminate_row_pivot_only_with_rhs_one_updates_rhs_only()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
